results.caption: A nostalgic Vietnamese shop decorated with national flags, featuring snacks and traditional items.
Two women in traditional embroidered clothing and a child in a carrier stand at a market stall displaying colorful textiles. suitable for background image
A collage of Da Nang Han Market showing a woman, traditional dresses, and woven baskets. Text: "Da Nang Han Market".
A bustling indoor market stall displays colorful hand-painted coconut bowls and crafts under Vietnamese flags.
